name: Maintenance Park
description: Moves the toolhead front-and-center at a comfortable height for nozzle swaps, cleaning, and inspection.
long_description: Adds a `MAINTENANCE` command. Homes the printer if it isn't homed, then parks the toolhead centered in X, forward in Y, and at a configurable working height — no more jogging axes by hand before every nozzle change. Works on any printer because positions are computed from your machine's own axis limits.

variables.name: park_z
variables.description: Working height (clamped to your Z max)

variables.name: front_offset
variables.description: Distance from the front Y limit

safety.notes: Homes and moves all axes. Clear the bed before running.
